title: Dual Wielder
description: Independent use keys for main-hand and off-hand actions!
body:
Tired of accidentally placing torches in your offhand? Want to block with your shield without unequipping your bow?

**Dual Wielder** allows you to seperately configure your main-hand and off-hand keybinds to fix these common problems, and many more!

**By default, the mod doesn't change anything,** but if you **open your keybind settings you can enable the mod's features.**
![Keybind menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b5d9636279d8371cf8eda5ecf00a54ee4d3f1e3.png)
By unbinding the default use key **(Select it and press Escape)** and binding the 2 new keybinds you can finally have full control over your off-hand and main-hand!

The mod is still a work in progress, so expect some issues. If you are encountering problems you can always switch between vanilla keybinds and modded keybinds
